title: Maker Studio Marketplace Registry Index
description: Schema for the canonical index.json that the Maker Studio editor fetches to populate its in-app Marketplace.

$schema.description: Reference to this schema. Lets editors auto-validate the file.

schemaVersion.description: Format version. Bumping is a breaking change for the editor. v2 added required `version`, `sha256`, `assetName` and removed `pubkey`.

updatedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last edit. Useful for cache invalidation and debugging.

id.description: Reverse-DNS mod id. Must match manifest.json#id. Cannot change once published.

name.description: The mod's display name (shown in the Marketplace and Mod Manager).

repo.description: GitHub owner/name. The pinned release is fetched at api.github.com/repos/{repo}/releases/tags/v{version}.

version.description: Pinned semver of the release the editor must install. The release tag is expected to be `v{version}`.

sha256.description: Lowercase hex SHA-256 of the release asset named `assetName`. Install is refused if the downloaded bytes do not match.

assetName.description: Exact filename of the .zip asset on the pinned release that the editor will download.

minStudioVersion.description: Lowest editor semver this mod supports.

verified.description: Maintainer-curated quality marker. Independent from signature verification.

permissions.description: Optional preview of the mod's manifest permissions. Authoritative copy lives inside the mod's manifest.json.
